{{日本の古墳 |名称 = 太子西山古墳 |画像 = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]
前方部正面
{{small|（[[敏達天皇]]河内磯長中尾陵・[[石姫皇女]]磯長原陵 拝所）}} |別名 = 奥城古墳 |所属 = [[磯長谷古墳群]] |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[南河内郡]][[太子町 (大阪府)|太子町]]大字太子 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 30|緯度秒 = 42.60 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 7.75 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長113m（93m） |築造年代 = [[古墳時代]]後期前半 |埋葬施設 = （推定）[[横穴式石室]] |被葬者 = （[[宮内庁]]治定）第30代[[敏達天皇]]・[[石姫皇女]] |出土品 = [[埴輪]]片 |陵墓 = [[宮内庁]]治定「河内磯長中尾陵」・「磯長原陵」 |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |ラベル = 太子西山
古墳 |アイコン = 前方後円墳-北西 |ラベル位置 = top }} {{OSM Location map | coord = {{Coord|34|30|58|N|135|38|43|E}} | zoom = 14 | float = right | width = 320| height =250 | caption = {{center|[[磯長谷古墳群]]分布図}} | scalemark = 60 | mark-coord1= {{Coord|34|30|42.60|N|135|38|7.75|E}} | label1=太子西山 (敏達) | label-pos1=top | label-color1=black | mark1=前方後円墳-北西.png | mark-size1=30 | mark-coord2= {{Coord|34|31|0.43|N|135|38|39.13|E}} | label2=春日向山 (用明) | label-pos2=top | label-color2=black | mark2=方墳.png | mark-size2=30 | mark-coord3= {{Coord|34|30|42.83|N|135|38|58.44|E}} | label3=山田高塚 (推古) | label-pos3=top | label-color3=black | mark3=方墳.png | mark-size3=30 | mark-coord4= {{Coord|34|31|3.14|N|135|39|15.84|E}} | label4=山田上ノ山 (孝徳) | label-pos4=top | label-color4=black | mark4=円墳.png | mark-size4=30 | mark-coord5= {{Coord|34|31|11.23|N|135|38|21.38|E}} | label5=叡福寺北 (聖徳太子) | label-pos5=top | label-color5=black | mark5=円墳.png | mark-size5=30 | mark-coord6= {{Coord|34|30|38.96|N|135|39|5.65|E}} | label6=二子塚 | label-pos6=bottom | label-color6=black | mark6=方墳.png | mark-size6=30 | mark-coord7= {{Coord|34|30|41.09|N|135|38|32.64|E}} | label7=釜戸塚 | label-pos7=top | label-color7=black | mark7=円墳.png | mark-size7=30 | mark-coord8= {{Coord|34|30|38.94|N|135|38|33.84|E}} | label8=石塚 | label-pos8=bottom | label-color8=black | mark8=円墳.png | mark-size8=30 | mark-coord9= {{Coord|34|30|40.17|N|135|38|36.33|E}} | label9=葉室塚 | label-pos9=right | label-color9=black | mark9=方墳.png | mark-size9=30 }} '''太子西山古墳'''（たいしにしやまこふん、奥城古墳<おくつきこふん>{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}）は、[[大阪府]][[南河内郡]][[太子町 (大阪府)|太子町]]太子にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。[[磯長谷古墳群]]を構成する古墳の1つ。 実際の被葬者は明らかでないが、[[宮内庁]]により「'''河内磯長中尾陵'''（こうちのしながのなかのおのみささぎ）」および「'''磯長原陵'''（しながのはらのみささぎ）」として第30代[[敏達天皇]]・[[石姫皇女]]（[[欽明天皇]][[皇后]]）の[[陵墓|合葬陵]]に治定されている。 == 概要 == 大阪府南東部、[[二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|二上山]]山麓の磯長谷において、葉室集落西方を南北に伸びる丘陵の鞍部に築造された大型前方後円墳である{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}。磯長谷に分布する[[磯長谷古墳群]]のうちでは唯一の前方後円墳になる。現在は[[宮内庁]]治定の天皇陵として同庁の管理下にあるため、これまでに本格的な調査はなされていない。 墳形は前方後円形で、前方部を北西方に向ける{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}。墳丘は2段築成{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}。墳丘周辺では[[埴輪]]片が採集されているほか、墳丘周囲には空壕が巡らされる{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}。埋葬施設は明らかでないが、[[横穴式石室]]の使用が推測される。 この太子西山古墳は、出土埴輪等より[[古墳時代]]後期前半頃の築造と推定される。被葬者は明らかでないが、現在は[[宮内庁]]により第30代[[敏達天皇]]（[[585年]]?崩御）および母の[[石姫皇女]]（崩御年不詳）の墓に治定されている{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}。磯長谷では敏達天皇陵のほか[[用明天皇|用明]]・[[推古天皇|推古]]・[[孝徳天皇]]陵と[[聖徳太子]]墓が伝わっており、これらは「梅鉢御陵」と総称される。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}。 * 墳丘長：113メートル（または93メートル[http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html 敏達天皇陵（太子西山古墳/奥城古墳）]（太子町ホームページ）。） * 後円部 直径：58メートル * 前方部 幅：67メートル == 被葬者 == 太子西山古墳の実際の被葬者は明らかでないが、[[宮内庁]]では第30代'''[[敏達天皇]]'''および母の'''[[石姫皇女]]'''（いしひめのひめみこ/いしひめのおうじょ）の合葬陵に治定している[https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html 天皇陵]（宮内庁）。宮内省諸陵寮編[{{NDLDC|1237123/11}} 『陵墓要覧』]（1934年、国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション）11コマ。{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}{{Sfn|磯長原陵（国史）}}『陵墓地形図集成 縮小版』 宮内庁書陵部陵墓課編、学生社、2014年、p. 407。。敏達天皇について、『[[日本書紀]]』では敏達天皇14年（[[585年]]?）『日本書紀』敏達天皇14年（585年?）8月己亥（15日）条。に崩御したとするほか、その後の[[殯]]を経て、[[崇峻天皇]]4年（[[591年]]?）『日本書紀』崇峻天皇4年（591年?）4月甲子（12日）条。には先に亡くなっていた石姫皇女（崩御年不詳）の墓に追葬されたとし、その陵号を「磯長陵」とする{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。また『[[古事記]]』では「御陵在川内科長」と見える。『[[延喜式]]』[[諸陵式|諸陵寮]]『延喜式』巻21（治部省）諸陵寮条。では敏達天皇陵は遠陵の「河内磯長中尾陵」として記載され、[[河内国]][[石川郡]]の所在で、兆域は東西3町・南北3町で守戸5烟を毎年あてるとするほか、石姫皇女墓は遠墓の「磯長原墓」として記載され、河内国石川郡敏達天皇陵内の所在で、守戸3烟を毎年あてるとする{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。その後、元禄の探陵の時点では[[叡福寺]]領であったほか、[[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]）には拝所設置、[[1899年]]（明治32年）には御在所修補がなされている{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。 本古墳が敏達天皇陵であれば、天皇陵としては最後の前方後円墳に位置づけられるとともに{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}、埴輪列を有する陵としても最後に位置づけられる{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。また文献では敏達天皇陵・石姫皇女墓が別々に記載されることから、後円部・前方部での別埋葬と推測する説もある{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。一方で円筒埴輪の存在から、時代的に本古墳の敏達天皇陵への比定には否定的な説もあり{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}、真陵の所在に関しては[[葉室塚古墳]]（太子町葉室）に比定する説も挙げられている{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=38-41}}。 {{日本の古墳 |名称 = 太子西山古墳 |画像 = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]
前方部正面
{{small|（[[敏達天皇]]河内磯長中尾陵・[[石姫皇女]]磯長原陵 拝所）}} |別名 = 奥城古墳 |所属 = [[磯長谷古墳群]] |所在地 = [[大阪府]][[南河内郡]][[太子町 (大阪府)|太子町]]大字太子 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 30|緯度秒 = 42.60 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 38|経度秒 = 7.75 |ISO = JP-27 |形状 = [[前方後円墳]] |規模 = 墳丘長113m（93m） |築造年代 = [[古墳時代]]後期前半 |埋葬施設 = （推定）[[横穴式石室]] |被葬者 = （[[宮内庁]]治定）第30代[[敏達天皇]]・[[石姫皇女]] |出土品 = [[埴輪]]片 |陵墓 = [[宮内庁]]治定「河内磯長中尾陵」・「磯長原陵」 |特記事項 = |地図 = Japan Osaka |ラベル = 太子西山
古墳 |アイコン = 前方後円墳-北西 |ラベル位置 = top }} {{OSM Location map | coord = {{Coord|34|30|58|N|135|38|43|E}} | zoom = 14 | float = right | width = 320| height =250 | caption = {{center|[[磯長谷古墳群]]分布図}} | scalemark = 60 | mark-coord1= {{Coord|34|30|42.60|N|135|38|7.75|E}} | label1=太子西山 (敏達) | label-pos1=top | label-color1=black | mark1=前方後円墳-北西.png | mark-size1=30 | mark-coord2= {{Coord|34|31|0.43|N|135|38|39.13|E}} | label2=春日向山 (用明) | label-pos2=top | label-color2=black | mark2=方墳.png | mark-size2=30 | mark-coord3= {{Coord|34|30|42.83|N|135|38|58.44|E}} | label3=山田高塚 (推古) | label-pos3=top | label-color3=black | mark3=方墳.png | mark-size3=30 | mark-coord4= {{Coord|34|31|3.14|N|135|39|15.84|E}} | label4=山田上ノ山 (孝徳) | label-pos4=top | label-color4=black | mark4=円墳.png | mark-size4=30 | mark-coord5= {{Coord|34|31|11.23|N|135|38|21.38|E}} | label5=叡福寺北 (聖徳太子) | label-pos5=top | label-color5=black | mark5=円墳.png | mark-size5=30 | mark-coord6= {{Coord|34|30|38.96|N|135|39|5.65|E}} | label6=二子塚 | label-pos6=bottom | label-color6=black | mark6=方墳.png | mark-size6=30 | mark-coord7= {{Coord|34|30|41.09|N|135|38|32.64|E}} | label7=釜戸塚 | label-pos7=top | label-color7=black | mark7=円墳.png | mark-size7=30 | mark-coord8= {{Coord|34|30|38.94|N|135|38|33.84|E}} | label8=石塚 | label-pos8=bottom | label-color8=black | mark8=円墳.png | mark-size8=30 | mark-coord9= {{Coord|34|30|40.17|N|135|38|36.33|E}} | label9=葉室塚 | label-pos9=right | label-color9=black | mark9=方墳.png | mark-size9=30 }} '''太子西山古墳'''（たいしにしやまこふん、奥城古墳<おくつきこふん>{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}）は、[[大阪府]][[南河内郡]][[太子町 (大阪府)|太子町]]太子にある[[古墳]]。形状は[[前方後円墳]]。[[磯長谷古墳群]]を構成する古墳の1つ。 実際の被葬者は明らかでないが、[[宮内庁]]により「'''河内磯長中尾陵'''（こうちのしながのなかのおのみささぎ）」および「'''磯長原陵'''（しながのはらのみささぎ）」として第30代[[敏達天皇]]・[[石姫皇女]]（[[欽明天皇]][[皇后]]）の[[陵墓|合葬陵]]に治定されている。 == 概要 == 大阪府南東部、[[二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|二上山]]山麓の磯長谷において、葉室集落西方を南北に伸びる丘陵の鞍部に築造された大型前方後円墳である{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}。磯長谷に分布する[[磯長谷古墳群]]のうちでは唯一の前方後円墳になる。現在は[[宮内庁]]治定の天皇陵として同庁の管理下にあるため、これまでに本格的な調査はなされていない。 墳形は前方後円形で、前方部を北西方に向ける{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}。墳丘は2段築成{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}。墳丘周辺では[[埴輪]]片が採集されているほか、墳丘周囲には空壕が巡らされる{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}。埋葬施設は明らかでないが、[[横穴式石室]]の使用が推測される。 この太子西山古墳は、出土埴輪等より[[古墳時代]]後期前半頃の築造と推定される。被葬者は明らかでないが、現在は[[宮内庁]]により第30代[[敏達天皇]]（[[585年]]?崩御）および母の[[石姫皇女]]（崩御年不詳）の墓に治定されている{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}。磯長谷では敏達天皇陵のほか[[用明天皇|用明]]・[[推古天皇|推古]]・[[孝徳天皇]]陵と[[聖徳太子]]墓が伝わっており、これらは「梅鉢御陵」と総称される。 == 墳丘 == 墳丘の規模は次の通り{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}。 * 墳丘長：113メートル（または93メートル[http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html 敏達天皇陵（太子西山古墳/奥城古墳）]（太子町ホームページ）。） * 後円部 直径：58メートル * 前方部 幅：67メートル == 被葬者 == 太子西山古墳の実際の被葬者は明らかでないが、[[宮内庁]]では第30代'''[[敏達天皇]]'''および母の'''[[石姫皇女]]'''（いしひめのひめみこ/いしひめのおうじょ）の合葬陵に治定している[https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html 天皇陵]（宮内庁）。宮内省諸陵寮編[{{NDLDC|1237123/11}} 『陵墓要覧』]（1934年、国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション）11コマ。{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}{{Sfn|磯長原陵（国史）}}『陵墓地形図集成 縮小版』 宮内庁書陵部陵墓課編、学生社、2014年、p. 407。。敏達天皇について、『[[日本書紀]]』では敏達天皇14年（[[585年]]?）『日本書紀』敏達天皇14年（585年?）8月己亥（15日）条。に崩御したとするほか、その後の[[殯]]を経て、[[崇峻天皇]]4年（[[591年]]?）『日本書紀』崇峻天皇4年（591年?）4月甲子（12日）条。には先に亡くなっていた石姫皇女（崩御年不詳）の墓に追葬されたとし、その陵号を「磯長陵」とする{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。また『[[古事記]]』では「御陵在川内科長」と見える。『[[延喜式]]』[[諸陵式|諸陵寮]]『延喜式』巻21（治部省）諸陵寮条。では敏達天皇陵は遠陵の「河内磯長中尾陵」として記載され、[[河内国]][[石川郡]]の所在で、兆域は東西3町・南北3町で守戸5烟を毎年あてるとするほか、石姫皇女墓は遠墓の「磯長原墓」として記載され、河内国石川郡敏達天皇陵内の所在で、守戸3烟を毎年あてるとする{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。その後、元禄の探陵の時点では[[叡福寺]]領であったほか、[[元治]]元年（[[1864年]]）には拝所設置、[[1899年]]（明治32年）には御在所修補がなされている{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。 本古墳が敏達天皇陵であれば、天皇陵としては最後の前方後円墳に位置づけられるとともに{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}、埴輪列を有する陵としても最後に位置づけられる{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。また文献では敏達天皇陵・石姫皇女墓が別々に記載されることから、後円部・前方部での別埋葬と推測する説もある{{Sfn|河内磯長中尾陵（国史）}}。一方で円筒埴輪の存在から、時代的に本古墳の敏達天皇陵への比定には否定的な説もあり{{Sfn|太子西山古墳（平凡社）|1986年}}{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=14-15}}、真陵の所在に関しては[[葉室塚古墳]]（太子町葉室）に比定する説も挙げられている{{Sfn|王陵の谷・磯長谷古墳群|1994年|pp=38-41}}。 {{afc comment|1=See [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. Front part of the mound
{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |location = {{ill|Taishi|ja|太子町 (大阪府)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District|ja|南河内郡|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in {{ill|Taishi|ja|太子町 (大阪府)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of {{ill|Mount Nijō|ja|二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|1=Mount Nijō|2=ja|3=二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|4=ceb|5=Nijō San|6=fr|7=Mont Nijō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Emperor Bidatsu|ja|敏達天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Princess Ishi-hime|ja|石姫皇女|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Ancient Kofuns in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Ancient Kofuns in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]]

But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Taishi Nishiyama Kofun |image = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]
Front part of the mound
{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |location = {{ill|Taishi|ja|太子町 (大阪府)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District|ja|南河内郡|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in {{ill|Taishi|ja|太子町 (大阪府)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of {{ill|Mount Nijō|ja|二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|1=Mount Nijō|2=ja|3=二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|4=ceb|5=Nijō San|6=fr|7=Mont Nijō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Emperor Bidatsu|ja|敏達天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Princess Ishi-hime|ja|石姫皇女|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Ancient Kofuns in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]]

It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Ancient Kofuns in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]]

This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Taishi Nishiyama Kofun |image = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]

{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = {{ill|Taishi|ja|太子町 (大阪府)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi|qq=}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District|ja|南河内郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamikawachi District|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefecture|qq=}} |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in {{ill|Taishi|ja|太子町 (大阪府)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of {{ill|Mount Nijō|ja|二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|1=Mount Nijō|2=ja|3=二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|4=ceb|5=Nijō San|6=fr|7=Mont Nijō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mount Nijō|13=User:Immanuelle/Mount Nijō|qq=}} in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Taishi Nishiyama Kofun |image = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]
Front part of the mound
{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = {{ill|Taishi|ja|太子町 (大阪府)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi|qq=}}, {{ill|Minamikawachi District|ja|南河内郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamikawachi District|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefecture|qq=}} |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in {{ill|Taishi|ja|太子町 (大阪府)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taishi|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|ja|大阪府|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka Prefecture|qq=}}, Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of {{ill|Mount Nijō|ja|二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|1=Mount Nijō|2=ja|3=二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)|4=ceb|5=Nijō San|6=fr|7=Mont Nijō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mount Nijō|13=User:Immanuelle/Mount Nijō|qq=}} in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * {{ill|Emperor Bidatsu|ja|敏達天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Bidatsu|qq=}} * {{ill|Princess Ishi-hime|ja|石姫皇女|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Ishi-hime|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Ancient Kofuns in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]]

It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Ancient Kofuns in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]]

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Taishi Nishiyama Kofun |image = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]
Front part of the mound
{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Ancient Kofuns in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:大阪府の古墳]] [[Category:大阪府太子町の歴史]] [[Category:敏達天皇]]

The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Ancient Kofuns in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:大阪府の古墳]] [[Category:大阪府太子町の歴史]] [[Category:敏達天皇]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - {{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Ancient Kofuns in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture�]] [[Category:大阪府太子町の歴史]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster -
