Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Taishi Nishiyama Kofun |image = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]
Front part of the mound
{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Imperial tombs of Japan]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:大阪府太子町の歴史]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Isonokami Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:大阪府太子町の歴史]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:大阪府太子町の歴史]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Taishi Nishiyama Kofun |image = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]
Front part of the mound
{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:大阪府太子町の歴史]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:大阪府太子町の歴史]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:大阪府太子町の歴史]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "町の歴史" to "の Municipal History"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Taishi Nishiyama Kofun |image = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]
Front part of the mound
{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:大阪府太子の Municipal History]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal History of Taishi, Ōsaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:磯長谷古墳群]]

The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal History of Taishi, Ōsaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:Isonagatani Kofun Group]]

{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Taishi Nishiyama Kofun |image = [[File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg|280px]]
Front part of the mound
{{small|([[Emperor Bidatsu]]'s Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb and [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]]'s Shinaga Plain Tomb {{ill|Haisho|ja|拝所|lt=worship site|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haisho|qq=}})}} |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Minamikawachi District, Osaka|Minamikawachi District]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]] |coordinates = 34|30|42.60 |coordinates = 135|38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal History of Taishi, Ōsaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:Shinagadani Kofun Cluster]]

This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Taishi Nishiyama Kofun |image = File:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun, haisho.jpg |alternate_name = Okutsuki Kofun |group = {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |location = {{ill|Taishi|qid=Q1347173}} |coordinates = {{Coord|34.511833|N|135.635486|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|30|42.60 |38|7.75 |iso_code = JP-27 |type = [[Keyhole-shaped tumulus]] |size = Mound length: 113 m (or 93 m) |built = Early Late [[Kofun period]] |burial = Presumed to be a {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} |occupants = ([[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] Historic Site1) [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] |burial goods = [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] fragments |imperial_tomb = {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |special_notes = |map = Japan Osaka |map_dot_label = Taishi Nishiyama
Kofun |type = Keyhole-shaped tumulus - Northwest |map_dot_label = top |architectural_styles = {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|qid=Q11268718}} |commemorates = {{ill|Bidatsu|qid=Q316637}}; {{ill|Ishihime|qid=Q11585498}} |part_of = {{ill|Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qid=Q11588120}} }} '''Taishi Nishiyama Kofun''' (太子西山古墳), also known as '''Okutsuki Kofun''' (奥城古墳), is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi]], [[:en:Osaka Prefecture|Osaka Prefecture]], Japan. It is part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. While the actual occupants are unknown, the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint burial tomb for [[Emperor Bidatsu]] and [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (Empress of [[:en:Emperor Kinmei|Emperor Kinmei]]). == Overview == Taishi Nishiyama Kofun is a large [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located on the foothills of [[:en:Mount Nijō|Mount Nijō]] in southeastern Osaka Prefecture. It was built at the saddle of a ridge extending north to south, west of the Hamuro settlement in Isonokami Valley, typeing part of the {{ill|Isonokami Kofun Cluster|ja|磯長谷古墳群|1=Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinagadani Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. It is the only [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] within this cluster. As it is Historic Site1 an imperial tomb, it is under the administration of the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]], and no typeal excavation has been conducted to date. The tumulus faces northwest, featuring a two-tiered mound construction{{Cite web|url=http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html|title=Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)|publisher=Taishi Town Official Website}}. Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal History of Taishi, Ōsaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:Shinagadani Kofun Cluster]]

Haniwa fragments have been collected from the mound, and there is evidence of a surrounding moat{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber. Based on haniwa and other burial goods, the tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the early part of the late [[Kofun period]]. == area == The mound area are as follows{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986|pages= }}{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}: * '''Mound length''': 113 m (or 93 m) * '''Rear round section''': ** Diameter: 58 m * '''Front square section''': ** Width: 67 m == Occupants == The actual occupants of Taishi Nishiyama Kofun remain unknown. However, the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] designates it as the joint tomb of the 30th [[Emperor Bidatsu]] (崩御 in 585?) and his mother, [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] (year of death unknown). The tomb is referred to as the {{ill|Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Taishi Nishiyama Kofun|lt=Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|ja|河内磯長中尾陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太子西山古墳}} and {{ill|Shinaga Plain Tomb|ja|磯長原陵|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinaga Plain Tomb|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, respectively{{Cite web|url=https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/successive_list.html|title=List of Mausoleums|publisher=Imperial Household Agency}}. If this tumulus is indeed Emperor Bidatsu's tomb, it would be the last [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] imperial tomb and the final [[kofun]] featuring [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]]{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=14–15}}. However, the presence of cylindrical haniwa casts doubt on its identification with Emperor Bidatsu's tomb{{Cite book|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|author=Heibonsha|year=1986}}. Some researchers suggest the actual tomb might be {{ill|Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun Group|lt=Hamuro Kofun|ja|葉室塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamuro Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 葉室古墳群}}, also located in Taishi Town{{Cite book|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|author=Taishi Town Board of Education|year=1994|pages=38–41}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1986|title=Japanese Historical Place names Encyclopedia, Osaka Prefecture|publisher=Heibonsha}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1994|title=Isonokami Kofun Cluster - The Royal Tombs of Taishi Town|publisher=Taishi Town Board of Education}} == See Also == * [[:en:Emperor Bidatsu|Emperor Bidatsu]] * [[:en:Princess Ishi-hime|Princess Ishi-hime]] == External Links == * [https://www.kunaicho.go.jp/ryobo/guide/030/index.html Kawachi Shinaga Naka no O Tomb] - Imperial Household Agency * [http://www.town.taishi.osaka.jp/kanko_info/rekishi_shiseki/bidatsutennoryo.html Emperor Bidatsu's Tomb (Taishi Nishiyama Kofun)] - Taishi Town Official Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|太子西山古墳|version=93243016|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]][[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Taishi Nishiyama Kofun]] [[ja:太子西山古墳]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal History of Taishi, Ōsaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Emperor Bidatsu]] [[Category:Japanese imperial tombs]] [[Category:Shinagadani Kofun Cluster]] {{wikidata link|Q48751982}}
